Catalog/Urology/Glizer Amplatz Sheath
UrologyREF: MRL-URO-010

Glizer Amplatz Sheath

Glizer · Sheaths

Tapered distal end allows smooth, atraumatic advancement over dilators or balloons. Kink-resistant PTFE material boosts durability. Dilates tissue around a dilator to maintain a nephrostomy tract for instrument access.

MaterialPTFE
Frequently Asked Questions

Tapered distal end allows smooth, atraumatic advancement over dilators or balloons. Kink-resistant PTFE material boosts durability. Dilates tissue around a dilator to maintain a nephrostomy tract for instrument access.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Glizer Amplatz Sheath, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Glizer Amplatz Sheath is constructed using PTFE, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
